title: safety.viz histogram data contract
description: Long-format results data: one record per measurement (SH-DATA-001). Column names are supplied by the settings mapping; the histogram removes missing/non-numeric results with a reported count (SH-DATA-002) and degrades gracefully when optional columns are absent (SH-DATA-003).

data.description: d3.csv()-style records; every row carries the measure and result columns named in settings.

settings.description: Column mappings and rendering options; merged onto the module's DEFAULT_SETTINGS, so only overrides need to be supplied.

measure_col.description: Column holding the measure name; required in data.

value_col.description: Column holding the numeric result; required in data.

unit_col.description: Optional unit column, appended to measure labels.

normal_col_low.description: Optional lower limit of normal; normal-range UI hides for measures without normal data (SH-FUNC-004C).

filters.description: Optional filter columns rendered as controls.

groups.description: Optional group-by columns for small-multiple charts.

details.description: Optional listing columns; defaults derive from the other mappings.
